  "claims": [
    "California is experiencing a severe shortage of Certified Nursing Assistants (CNAs), with 34 out of 58 counties reporting staffing shortages.",
    "Translating the CNA competency exam into Spanish could significantly reduce the shortage of nurses in California.",
